description: Create or edit Claude Code skills with expert guidance on structure and best practices

Invoke the Skill(skogai-skills) _ALWAYS_. Now if the input or context show that we are focusing on the actual prompt itself more than potential script, information or references then please also load Skill(skogai-agent-prompting) at the same time.
